narrative:
Hanover Twp 7 (precinct in Butler County) has 968 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.6 percentage points.
